properties.name: security.apikey.pepper
properties.description: Application-specific secret used as a pepper when hashing API keys. Keep this value private and stable across deployments.

properties.name: encryption.key
properties.description: Master key used by the application for encryption/decryption operations. Use a strong key and store it securely.

properties.name: otp.max.requests.per.email.per.hour
properties.description: Maximum number of OTP generation requests allowed per email address within one hour.

properties.name: otp.resend.cooldown.seconds
properties.description: Minimum wait time in seconds before an OTP can be resent for the same email.

properties.name: otp.max.attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of OTP verification attempts allowed before the OTP is rejected.

properties.name: otp.ttl.minutes
properties.description: OTP validity duration in minutes before the code expires.

properties.name: otp.ttl.minutes
properties.description: OTP validity duration in minutes before the code expires.

properties.name: otp.length
properties.description: Number of digits/characters generated for each OTP code.

properties.name: otp.max.resends.per.hour
properties.description: Maximum number of OTP resend operations allowed per hour.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT access token lifetime (for example in milliseconds) used when issuing authentication tokens.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and validate JWT tokens. This value must be kept confidential.

properties.name: esewa.secret.key
properties.description: Secret key used for signing and validating eSewa payment requests/responses.

properties.name: esewa.merchant.id
properties.description: Merchant identifier registered with eSewa for payment processing.

properties.name: esewa.payment.url
properties.description: eSewa endpoint URL used to initiate payment transactions.

properties.name: esewa.success.url
properties.description: Application callback URL that eSewa redirects to after a successful payment.

properties.name: esewa.verify.url
properties.description: eSewa API endpoint used to verify payment transaction status.

properties.name: esewa.failure.url
properties.description: Application callback URL that eSewa redirects to when a payment fails or is canceled.

properties.name: applicationinsights.connection.string
properties.description: Azure Application Insights connection string used by the telemetry agent to send logs, traces, and metrics.

properties.name: azure.application-insights.instrumentation-key
properties.description: Legacy Application Insights instrumentation key. Prefer using the connection string setting instead.

properties.name: azure.entra.client-id
properties.description: A description for 'azure.entra.client-id'
